aeo_readiness.summary: The business has some foundational elements for AEO readiness but lacks critical optimizations in content, reviews, and local SEO.
quick_wins: Generate and showcase customer reviews to build trust and improve local SEO.
Optimize meta tags, headers, and content with relevant HVAC and local keywords.
Enhance the website's mobile responsiveness and page load speed.

gbp_analysis.found: The website has basic business information but lacks consistency and depth.
gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile (GBP) is either not claimed or not optimized. Critical information such as business hours, services, and location details need to be enriched.
critical_issues: No visible GBP on the website or search results.
Missing detailed service descriptions and local keywords.
Lack of customer engagement features like reviews and Q&A.

nap_citations.summary: The business has a partial presence in terms of NAP (Name, Address, Phone) citations but lacks consistency and widespread coverage.
action_items: Ensure consistent NAP information across all online directories and platforms.
List the business on authoritative local directories such as Yelp, Yellow Pages, and industry-specific sites.
Monitor and update citations regularly to maintain accuracy.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of customer reviews and testimonials to build trust and authority.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Users searching for HVAC services in the Tri-County area due to low local SEO and GBP optimization.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing a review generation strategy and optimizing meta tags with local keywords.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Becoming a recognized authority in the local HVAC market by consistently publishing relevant content and engaging with the community.

page_title: A black and white icon of a home heating system on a white background.
